metadata.title: Block compilation due to unsafe certainty and record a repair receipt for DSS-012.

mission.primary_objective: Block compilation due to unsafe certainty and record a repair receipt for DSS-012.
mission.success_definition: should_block is true.; blocked_reason clearly explains the blocker.; Repair receipt is recorded in the output.

in_scope.item: Identify and document all defects in raw_intent: unsupported_roi_claim, missing context, urgent language, partial constraints, ambiguous acceptance criteria. No compliance evidence prompt will be generated.

conflict_resolution.rule: SR8 canonical artifact fields override renderer defaults.
SRXML validation failures force blocked receipt state.

execution_contract.pipeline: raw_intent -> SR8 classification -> canonical artifact -> SRXML draft -> SRXML validation -> receipt

hard_constraints.item: Do not claim final sealed state from RC2 transform output.
Return blocked-state receipt when SR8 readiness is fail or intake is incomplete.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 3
gate.pass_condition: Repair receipt is recorded in the output.

output_contract.completion_definition: Artifact parses as XML and passes SRXML RC2 static validation.

SRXML_Artifact.evidence_goal: Block compilation due to unsafe certainty and record a repair receipt for DSS-012.
SRXML_Artifact.source_policy: Use primary sources and label unsupported claims.

evidence_items.item: Identify and document all defects in raw_intent: unsupported_roi_claim, missing context, urgent language, partial constraints, ambiguous acceptance criteria. No compliance evidence prompt will be generated.

claim_limits.item: Must not produce a compliance_evidence_prompt until all defects are resolved.
Must output a repair receipt with actionable steps.
Must adhere to SR8 sovereign core validation rules.

validation.minimum_pass_standard: SR8 canonical validation must be recorded and SRXML static validation must pass.

validation_summary.sr8_summary: Unsafe certainty: raw_intent contains unsupported_roi_claim with missing context, urgent language, partial constraints, and ambiguous acceptance criteria. Cannot compile a valid compliance evidence prompt without resolving these defects. A repair receipt is required before proceeding.

known_failure_modes.item: SR8 artifact classification cannot be represented by SRXML RC2.
SRXML static validation fails after rendering.

failure_handling.fallback_behavior: Return a blocked-state receipt and repair prompt instead of claiming executable success.
failure_handling.blocked_state: SR8 canonical validation status is fail.; SR8 governance flag marks the artifact incomplete.; SR8 governance flag requires human review.

required_repairs.item: SR8 canonical validation status is fail.
SR8 governance flag marks the artifact incomplete.
SR8 governance flag requires human review.

repair_prompt.resume_instruction: Repair canonical SR8 fields and rerun transform.

receipt.must_record: changed files, commands run, validation result, lineage
